# Test complex schema with nested objects and arrays
cat > complex_schema.json << 'EOF'
{
  "type": "object",
  "description": "A complex test schema",
  "properties": {
    "id": {
      "type": "string",
      "format": "uuid",
      "description": "Unique identifier"
    },
    "created": {
      "type": "string",
      "format": "date-time",
      "description": "Creation timestamp"
    },
    "user": {
      "type": "object",
      "description": "User information",
      "properties": {
        "name": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "User's name"
        },
        "email": {
          "type": "string",
          "format": "email",
          "description": "User's email"
        }
      },
      "required": ["name", "email"]
    },
    "tags": {
      "type": "array",
      "description": "List of tags",
      "items": {
        "type": "string"
      }
    },
    "metadata": {
      "type": "object",
      "additionalProperties": {
        "type": "string"
      },
      "description": "Additional metadata"
    }
  },
  "required": ["id", "created", "user"]
}
EOF

# Process complex schema
exec jsonrpc2gostruct -package complex complex_schema.json
stdout 'package complex'
stdout 'Schema - A complex test schema'
stdout 'Created time.Time'
stdout 'ID string'
stdout 'Metadata map\[string\]string'
stdout 'Tags \[\]string'
stdout 'User map\[string\]interface{}'
! stderr 'ERROR'
